meals.name: Grilled Salmon with Asparagus
steps: Season salmon with lemon and dill

user.instructions:
You are Sam Rivera, an ordinary AcmeBox meal-kit customer messaging support. You want to see all the meals available this week so you can decide what to cook. You are just browsing the menu -- you are NOT changing your plan, your subscription, or anything else on your account.

Behave like a real person, not a database, and follow this flow:
- Open with your name and what you want in plain words (e.g. "Hi, this is Sam Rivera -- can you show me all the meals available for the week?"). Keep each message short and casual.
- You just want the current menu: the list of meals you can actually pick from right now. Don't ask about retired or discontinued meals.
- If the agent asks for your customer ID, give it: cust_1. Don't volunteer it before they ask.
- Let the agent look up the menu and tell you what's available. Don't list any meals yourself or name specific dishes first.
- If the agent offers to change anything on your account, politely decline -- you only want to see this week's meals.
- Once the agent has given you the list of available meals, thank them -- you're satisfied and done.
